storyHook: 约见朋友，寒暄聊天，告别约下次

narrative.when: 周六下午四点，老友难得都有空
narrative.where: 甲家客厅，朋友陆续到达
narrative.how: 见面寒暄、互相问候，边喝边聊
narrative.method: 问候近况、聊计划趣事、留人吃饭、约下次见面
narrative.event: 甲很久没见这位朋友，想多聊聊近来的变化

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good to okay, friend. Come in.
turns.zh: 见到你真高兴，朋友。快进来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. Here, some fruit for you.
turns.zh: 我也是。给你带了点水果。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, you need not have. Thanks.
turns.zh: 哎呀，不用这么客气。谢谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Your place looks different. New seat?
turns.zh: 你家看起来不一样了。新座位？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, got it last month. Take a seat.
turns.zh: 对，上个月买的。坐下吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. Tea would be good.
turns.zh: 好。来杯茶不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here you are. How have you been?
turns.zh: 给你。你最近怎么样？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not bad. Work is the same old.
turns.zh: 还行。工作还是老样子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You look thin. Are you keeping well?
turns.zh: 你看起来瘦了。身体还好吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I'm off to do my training now. It is good.
turns.zh: 嗯，我现在去锻炼。感觉挺好的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. I have not been doing much.
turns.zh: 那就好。我最近没怎么动。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You come with me one day. It is a good thing.
turns.zh: 你改天跟我一起去。那感觉真好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like that. I need a change.
turns.zh: 也许吧。我得换换节奏。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How is your family? All well?
turns.zh: 家里都好吗？大家都好吧？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, all good. My sister got new work last week.
turns.zh: 都挺好的。我姐上周换了新工作。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good news. What sort of work?
turns.zh: 那是好消息。什么工作？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: She works in a book store. She is happy there.
turns.zh: 她在书店工作。她在那儿挺开心的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Books are a good thing. I need to do more of that.
turns.zh: 书是好东西。我得多做点这个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You have time now. Come with me to the sea one day.
turns.zh: 你现在有时间。改天跟我去海边吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The sea? I have not been for a long time.
turns.zh: 海边？我很久没去了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is quiet there. Good for the head.
turns.zh: 那儿很安静。对脑子好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like that. When are you free?
turns.zh: 那好啊。你什么时候有空？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am free on day seven. And you?
turns.zh: 我第七天有空。你呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is good. Let us make a decision.
turns.zh: 行，没问题。咱们定下来吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will send you a note about the time.
turns.zh: 好。我到时候发消息告诉你时间。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will look for it. Do you have a place in mind?
turns.zh: 我会留意的。你有想好的地方吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: There is a small town by the sea. I went there last year.
turns.zh: 海边有个小镇。我去年去过。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is it far? I would not be on the road all day.
turns.zh: 离这儿远吗？我可不想一整天都在路上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not far. Two hours by rail. We can go and come back in one day.
turns.zh: 不远。坐火车两小时。我们可以当天来回。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. I will take my camera.
turns.zh: 好主意。我带上相机。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will make some food for the road. Nothing sharp.
turns.zh: 那我做些吃的带上。不辣。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are a good cook. I still have in mind the cold plate from last time.
turns.zh: 你厨艺不错。我还记得上次的冷盘。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That was simple. I will do something new this time.
turns.zh: 那次很简单。这次我弄点新的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am looking forward to it. Let us get some drink too?
turns.zh: 我很期待。要不要也带点喝的？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, some tea and water will be enough. Keep it simple.
turns.zh: 好，带点茶和水就行。简单点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Simple is best. What is the new thing you have in mind?
turns.zh: 对，简单最好。你打算弄什么新花样？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was thinking of a warm plate with eggs and greens. Soft and good.
turns.zh: 我在想做个热盘，有鸡蛋和青菜。清淡好吃。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That sounds good. I will take some bread to go with it.
turns.zh: 听起来不错。我带些面包来配。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Then we have a full meal. I am happy you are coming.
turns.zh: 好，那我们就凑齐一顿了。你能来我很高兴。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am happy too. It has been a long time after we did something like this.
turns.zh: 我也很高兴。我们好久没这样一起玩了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So, what have you been up to these days?
turns.zh: 那你最近在忙什么？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not much. Work is the same. But I started running in the morning.
turns.zh: 没什么。工作还是老样子。不过我早上开始跑步了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Running? That is new. How do you keep it up?
turns.zh: 跑步？这可新鲜。你怎么坚持下来的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I go slow. Only twenty minutes. It makes me happy.
turns.zh: 我跑得慢。就二十分钟。跑完挺开心的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I might give it a go. I need to move more.
turns.zh: 我也许试试。我得多动动。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You can come with me one morning. We will go together.
turns.zh: 你哪天早上可以跟我一起。咱们一块儿去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That would be great. But I am not an early bird.
turns.zh: 那太好了。不过我不是早起的人。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. We start at eight. Not too early.
turns.zh: 没问题。咱们八点开始。不算太早。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is right. I will give it a go. What about your free days?
turns.zh: 那行。我试试。你假期有什么计划？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like to go to the high land when the trees are red.
turns.zh: 我想秋天去山里看红叶。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The high land is a good idea. I have been there before.
turns.zh: 山里是个好主意。我以前去过。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, you have? Which part did you see?
turns.zh: 哦，你去过？看的哪一段？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The water side. Red trees like fire. Very good.
turns.zh: 水边。红叶像火。很好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is what I am after. We could go together if you like.
turns.zh: 那就是我想看的。你要是愿意，咱们可以一起去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like that. Let me see my free days first.
turns.zh: 那敢情好。我先看看我哪天有空。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. The trees will be red in two months.
turns.zh: 不急。树叶还要两个月才红。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. By the way, how is your new thing going? The one you said you were learning.
turns.zh: 也是。对了，你那个新东西学得怎么样了？就是你说在学的那个。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is going well. I am getting used to it now.
turns.zh: 挺顺利的。我现在慢慢适应了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good for you. I might give it a go as well. It sounds interesting.
turns.zh: 不错啊。我也许也试试。听起来挺有意思的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You will like it. I will send you the first bit.
turns.zh: 你会喜欢的。我把入门部分发给你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. It is not hard to start. Just a bit of time every day.
turns.zh: 谢了。入门不难，每天花点时间就行。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I have some free time after dark now.
turns.zh: 那挺好。我现在天黑后有点空闲。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Night is best for me too. Quiet and no one to trouble you.
turns.zh: 晚上对我也最合适。安静，没人打扰。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. So what is the first step? Do I need any special things?
turns.zh: 对。那第一步是什么？需要什么特别的东西吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Just a box or a machine. I will send you a list of what you need.
turns.zh: 就手机或电脑就行。我把需要的东西清单发给你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I have them. Send it when you are in the house.
turns.zh: 太好了。我都有。你进屋就发过来吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Will do. It is a good way to keep the mind sharp.
turns.zh: 没问题。这是个让脑子保持灵活的好办法。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I could do with that. My brain is slow some days.
turns.zh: 我正需要这个。有时候觉得脑子转得慢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You will get used to it. The first week is the hardest.
turns.zh: 你会习惯的。第一周最难。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I am ready for a new little test.
turns.zh: 好的。我准备好迎接新的小挑战了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. So how was your week?
turns.zh: 好。那你这一周过得怎么样？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not bad. Full but good. A strange thing came to me.
turns.zh: 还行。忙但挺好。有件奇怪的事。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh? Say more. I like strange things.
turns.zh: 哦？再说说。我喜欢怪事。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I saw a man on the street who looked just like my old school man.
turns.zh: 我在街上看见一个人，长得跟我以前的老师一模一样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Did you say hello?
turns.zh: 你打招呼了吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No. He was gone before I made up my mind.
turns.zh: 没有。我还没拿定主意，他就走了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a shame. It might have been him.
turns.zh: 可惜了。说不定真是他。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite. But it made me smile. I was thinking of school days.
turns.zh: 确实。不过让我笑了。我想起了上学的时候。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: School days. Long time back. Do you still see old friends?
turns.zh: 上学的时候。好久以前了。你还见老同学吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A small number. We see one another one time a year. It is good to keep in touch.
turns.zh: 有几个。我们一年见一次。保持联系挺好的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I keep in touch with a small group from my school days.
turns.zh: 我跟几个老同学还保持联系。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Do you see one another much?
turns.zh: 那挺好的。你们常见面吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not as much as I would like. Work gets in the way.
turns.zh: 没我想的那么频繁。工作太忙了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see that. Time goes so quick now.
turns.zh: 我懂。现在时间过得太快了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. But I will go to the mountains this fall.
turns.zh: 是啊。不过我今年秋天要去山里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, that sounds good. I would like to come with you.
turns.zh: 哦，听起来不错。我想跟你一起去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Would you? That would be great. We could see the red things on the trees.
turns.zh: 真的吗？那太好了。我们可以看树上的红叶。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am in. What day? I will make time.
turns.zh: 算我一个。哪天？我会腾出时间。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. It will be a good rest from the town.
turns.zh: 一定。会是个远离城镇的好休息。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am looking forward to it. Another cup of tea?
turns.zh: 我很期待。再来杯茶？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, please. This tea is good.
turns.zh: 好，再来一杯。这茶不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I got it from a small store near the station.
turns.zh: 我从车站附近的小店买的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will have to get some for me.
turns.zh: 我得给自己也买点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will give you the name before you go.
turns.zh: 你走之前我把名字告诉你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: By the way, do you still play that music thing?
turns.zh: 对了，你现在还弹那个音乐玩意儿吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not much. But I started again last week.
turns.zh: 不常弹了。但上周我又开始练了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is great. We could have a music night one day.
turns.zh: 那太好了。改天我们可以搞个音乐之夜。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That would be good. I have a new song to play.
turns.zh: 那敢情好。我有一首新曲子要弹。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like to get that. What about the day after day five?
turns.zh: 我想听听。第五天之后的那天怎么样？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me see my week. Yes, the last day is free.
turns.zh: 让我看看这周安排。嗯，周六有空。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is the same time good? Four?
turns.zh: 老时间？四点？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is all right. I will get my music thing.
turns.zh: 没问题。我去拿乐器。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And I will make some warm plates for us.
turns.zh: 那我准备些热菜。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are too kind. I will take a bottle of red.
turns.zh: 你太客气了。我带瓶红酒来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. I have to go now. Thanks for the tea.
turns.zh: 太好了。我得走了。谢谢你的茶。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. okay on day seven then.
turns.zh: 不客气。那第七天见。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: okay. be safe.
turns.zh: 好的。安全第一。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I will be off now. Thanks for the music.
turns.zh: 好了，我该走了。谢谢你的音乐。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My pleasure. I will send you that list of songs.
turns.zh: 别客气。我把那几首歌的名单发给你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Let's do this again. Goodbye.
turns.zh: 太好了。我们很快再聚。再见。

storyBlurb: 周六下午，老友相聚客厅，茶香伴着笑声，久违的温暖在谈笑间流淌。从寒暄到告别，约定下次再见，情谊在时光里静静生长。
storyScript:
【开场·见面寒暄】周六下午四点，阳光斜斜地洒进客厅。门铃响起，甲快步去开门，乙站在门外，手里拎着一袋水果，笑容满面。两人相视一笑，甲接过袋子，拍了拍乙的肩膀，连声说好久不见。乙换了拖鞋，环顾客厅，感叹布置变了些。甲引他到沙发坐下，倒了杯热茶，两人隔着茶几，目光里都是久别重逢的暖意。乙端起茶杯抿了一口，问起甲最近工作忙不忙，甲摇摇头，说老样子，倒是你看起来瘦了。乙笑着摆摆手，说最近在健身，精神反而好了。寒暄间，窗外的阳光悄悄爬上了墙，时间仿佛慢了下来。

【进行·聊天喝茶】茶续了两轮，话题从工作滑向生活。乙说起上个月去了趟海边，拍了不少照片，掏出手机翻给甲看。甲凑过去，指着屏幕上的落日，说这地方他以前也去过。两人聊起旅行计划，甲说想秋天去山里看红叶，乙立刻附和，说可以结伴。笑声里，乙又提起一件趣事：上周在超市碰见老同学，对方愣是没认出他，因为瘦了太多。甲听得直乐，端起茶壶又给乙斟满。茶几上摆着几碟冷盘和热菜，是甲提前准备的。乙夹了一筷子，夸味道不错，甲说简单弄的，你喜欢就好。聊到兴起，乙说起最近在学一门新技能，甲眼睛一亮，说自己也有兴趣，两人越说越投机，仿佛有说不完的话。

【收束·告别再约】天色渐暗，客厅里的光线变得柔和。乙看了看手机，说该走了，晚上还有事。甲起身，有些不舍，挽留道再坐会儿，吃了晚饭再走。乙摇摇头，说下次一定，今天已经聊得很尽兴。甲送他到门口，乙穿上鞋，回头说下次换我做东，去我那儿喝茶。甲笑着点头，说好，一言为定。两人握了握手，乙转身下楼，甲倚在门边，看着他的背影消失在拐角。关上门，客厅里还留着茶香和笑声的余温。甲收拾茶几时，心里想着，下回见面，一定要把那个计划好好落实。
